parsed.summary: The team met to align on the Q4 launch campaign for the new Meets Made Easy integration features. Key dependencies were identified, such as the need for visual assets from the design team, which will be unblocked by a new messaging guidelines document. Tasks were assigned to prepare for the launch, including drafting messaging, scheduling an agency kickoff, and preparing a stakeholder update. The team agreed to reconvene on Thursday to review the design progress.

key_decisions.decision: A kickoff meeting with the external agency will be scheduled for next Monday.
The team will reconvene on Thursday to review the designs.

action_items.task: Draft a Google Doc with campaign messaging guidelines and share it with the design team.
Create a calendar event for an agency kickoff sync next Monday.
Send an email to the external agency with the agenda for the kickoff meeting.
Write and send a summary email to the executive team with current progress and the launch timeline.

topics_discussed: Q4 launch campaign for Meets Made Easy integration
Landing page copy and visual assets
